svg.title: In-Memory Snapshot Synchronization — heap_sync Cluster
svg.desc: Struktur des heap_sync Clusters mit Leader und Follower Nodes, Shards mit eigenem Worker-Thread, Persistenz-Worker mit WAL und Snapshot-Persistence, sowie Replikation per Quorum.

g.text: submit_command — entry from SEM, TM and replication validator
command_id from next_command_id, routed via schema and pk hash to a shard
role leader, owns shard threads, applies committed entries, drives replication
single thread per node, blocking ring queue
snapshot_compact — atomic write + compact wal tail
replays entry on its own shard thread
